synthesis.notes: The GdCo2 ingot was prepared by melting of the constituent metals on a water-cooled copper hearth in a high purity argon atmosphere. The sample was remelted several times to promote homogeneity. Phase purity was ascertained by X-ray Debye-Scherrer diffraction with Cu-Kα radiation using a Siemens D-5000 diffractometer. The resulting sample is polycrystalline, metallic, and ferromagnetic with a Curie temperature of about 410 K.
